zh.lifeSummary: 當William Trott於1480年出生在英國薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福時，他的父親John Treat22歲，母親Mrs Joanna Trott16歲。他於1506年與Mrs Joann Trott在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1561年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Trott于1480年出生在英国薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福时，他的父亲John Treat22岁，母亲Mrs Joanna Trott16岁。他于1506年与Mrs Joann Trott在英国英格兰薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1561年在英国英格兰薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): in southwestern England, usually a variant of   Trout  .
South German: metonymic variant of   Trotter   2.

English (Somerset and Devon): nickname, either for one who moves quickly, at the pace of a trotting horse, from Middle English trot(te) (Old French trot) ‘trot’, perhaps given to a messenger (see Trotter , Trotman ); or occasionally perhaps from Middle English trot(te), trat(te) ‘old woman, hag’ (Anglo-Norman French trote).

variants.name: Trout
meanings: English (mainly Devon): nickname from Middle English trout(e), trut(e), trought(e), trot ‘trout’ (Old English trūht), perhaps for someone who caught or sold trout, or who was thought to resemble the fish in some way.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Trott was born in 1480, in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, his father, John Treat, was 22 and his mother, Mrs Joanna Trott, was 16. He married Mrs Joann Trott in 1506, in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1561, in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Trott est né en 1480, à Staplegrove, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Treat, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs Joanna Trott, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Joann Trott en 1506, à Staplegrove, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1561, à Staplegrove, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Trott 1480 in Staplegrove, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Treat 22 und seine Mutter Mrs Joanna Trott 16. Er hat 1506 in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Mrs Joann Trott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1561 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Trott è nato il nel 1480 nel Staplegrove, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John Treat, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Joanna Trott, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Joann Trott nel 1506, nel Staplegrove, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1561, nel Staplegrove, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Trottが1480年にイギリスソメルセトスタプレグローブで生まれた時，父John Treatは22歳，母Mrs Joanna Trottは16歳であった。1506年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトスタプレグローブでMrs Joann Trottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1561年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトスタプレグローブで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Trott(이)가 1480년 영국 서머세트 스타플레그로브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Treat(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Joanna Trott(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스타플레그로브에서 Mrs Joann Trott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1561년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스타플레그로브에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Trott nasceu em 1480, em Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Treat, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Joanna Trott, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Joann Trott em 1506, em Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1561, em Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Trott родился в 1480 г. в местности стаплегров, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Treat было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Joanna Trott, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Joann Trott в 1506 г. в местности стаплегров, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1561 г. в местности стаплегров, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Trott nació en 1480, en Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Treat, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mrs Joanna Trott, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Mrs Joann Trott en 1506, en Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1561, en Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
